title: Monster of the Week SRD
description: The official Evil Hat page for MotW. Links to the SRD, official playbooks, and where to buy the full book.

title: D&D 2024 Free Rules
description: The official free ruleset for D&D 2024. Has everything you need to start playing.

title: D&D 2024 SRD (CC BY 4.0)
description: The full System Reference Document for D&D 2024, freely available under Creative Commons. Great for homebrewers.

title: Pirate Borg Official Site
description: The official home of Pirate Borg. Rules, supplements, and community content for the grimy pirate OSR game.

title: Orc Borg (itch.io)
description: Orc Borg by Neon Pistache. A Mork Borg hack where you play as orcs. Cheap, weird, and very fun.

title: Itch.io TTRPG Section
description: The best place to find indie TTRPGs, many free or pay-what-you-want. Endlessly deep rabbit hole.

title: Roll20
description: Free browser-based virtual tabletop. Has built-in dice, maps, and character sheets.

title: Owlbear Rodeo
description: Minimal, fast virtual tabletop. No account needed for players. Great for one-shots where you just need a map.
